intro: Comanthosphace ningpoensis, also known as Ningpo gentian or Chinese gentian, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Gentianaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its purported anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Comanthosphace ningpoensis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, this plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the production of herbal teas and capsules.
